dialogue.intro: A {weapon}. Adorable. Try and parry me — bet you forgot you could.
dialogue.reveal_on_defeat: Every hit had a window. Every dodge could cancel. The {weapon} did it anyway. Take this — and try again.
dialogue.boss_side_intro: Now you're me. Watch them come at you the way you came at me.
dialogue.boss_side_win: You felt it. Time bends when you matter enough. Bring that forward.

dialogue.intro: I read your file. {weapon}, huh. We're scheduled.
dialogue.reveal_on_defeat: You felt that freeze, didn't you? That's what we do at the top.
dialogue.boss_side_intro: They keep sending interns. Make them wait. Make them pick.
dialogue.boss_side_win: Now you can break the rhythm whenever you like. Use it.

dialogue.intro: I have your trace. Your {weapon} pattern. I know the route.
dialogue.reveal_on_defeat: You see them now — the next two moves. Don't lose that.
dialogue.boss_side_intro: Watch them come. You already know where they'll be.
dialogue.boss_side_win: Onward. The wall is the last floor — you'll need every read you've got.
